title: Search and Discovery Interface
description: Web application interface enabling users to search collection or granule metadata using terms such as location, time, and characteristics.

definitions.definition: Web application interface enabling users to search collection or granule metadata using terms such as location, time, and characteristics.
definitions.notes: The results allow the discovery of datasets and supported services. Examples include (OneStop UI, EarthData UI)
